config_description:
--Distressed Venues with Verified Decline--

Established, well-reviewed restaurants, bars, and cafes now experiencing a sharp and confirmed drop in Transaction Velocity & Customer Sentiment.

These are previously high-performing venues where the 360-day sentiment was strong, but 90-day sentiment has crashed by 30%+.

That's a leading indicator of operational trouble, ownership fatigue, or market-ready distress.

Every listing is an independent hospitality and food & beverage location (no nation-wide chains), confirmed active with 100+ total reviews and an "Active Heartbeat" signal within the last 90 days.
config_name: Independent Restaurants Experiencing a 30%+ Crash in Foot Traffic & Sentiment This Quarter in Arkansas
